name: disable_pb30_additive
thesis: Measure whether the round-8 30m additive lane is genuinely additive.

name: disable_type_c_reentry
thesis: Check whether real re-entry supply is carrying robust expectancy.

name: disable_qqq_shorts
thesis: Check whether QQQ short expansion is adding or diluting edge.

name: disable_asset_context
thesis: Check whether context scoring adds discrimination.

name: disable_stall_exit
thesis: Check whether stall exits improve realised R.

name: disable_time_stop
thesis: Check whether the low-MFE time stop is protective or premature.

name: disable_midday_avoid
thesis: Test if midday avoidance is filtering negative expectancy.

name: gld_quality_exit_t2_25
thesis: Tighten GLD false positives while extending proven winners.

name: pb30_more_supply_tight_exit
thesis: Recover 30m supply but demand more entry proof and faster giveback control.

name: entry_adaptive_t2_25
thesis: Combine cleaner activation with more upside capture.

name: strict_discrimination_keep_frequency
thesis: Target GLD/type-C false positives while preserving QQQ supply.

name: capture_ladder_t2_25
thesis: Improve MFE capture with target extension plus floors.

name: score_qqq_plus1
thesis: Check whether QQQ supply can be cleaned without starving it.

name: combo_structure_vwap
thesis: Demand both structure and VWAP confirmation.

name: require_vwap
thesis: Probe VWAP as a hard filter.

name: require_structure
thesis: Probe market structure as a hard filter.

name: require_micro_break
thesis: Probe micro-break as a hard filter.

name: type_a_value_hits2
thesis: Require more value hits for Type-A.

name: qqq_require_di_alignment
thesis: Check if QQQ needs DI alignment.

name: pullback_orderly_all
thesis: Require orderly 1h pullbacks as well as PB30.

name: asset_context_min_00
thesis: Raise context permission floor to neutral.

name: entry_market_next_bar
thesis: Test simple next-bar market entries against structure-stop baseline.

name: entry_structure_stop_market
thesis: Use stop trigger without limit cap.

name: entry_adaptive_structure_stop
thesis: Adapt stop-limit width to signal bar range.

name: gld_structure_stop
thesis: Check whether GLD should also require structure-stop activation.

name: qqq_market_next_bar
thesis: Check whether QQQ structure-stop is too selective.

name: pb30_entry_market
thesis: Force PB30 lane to market entry.

name: pb30_entry_structure_stop
thesis: Force PB30 lane to structure-stop entry.

name: pb30_entry_vwap_retest
thesis: Use PB30 confirmation as permission for VWAP retest.

name: t2_175
thesis: Take T2 earlier to increase conversion.

name: t2_250
thesis: Extend T2 if MFE supports it.

name: qqq_partial_060
thesis: Let QQQ runners keep more size.

name: qqq_partial_080
thesis: Realise more QQQ size at T1.

name: mfe_giveback_225_045_075
thesis: Let winners breathe but lock more.

name: mfe_giveback_after_t1_only
thesis: Avoid premature giveback flattening before T1.

name: trail_no_vwap
thesis: Check whether VWAP trail is over-tight.

name: time_stop_min_mfe_075
thesis: Only hold if it has shown more progress.

name: profit_floor_ladder
thesis: Replace binary giveback with a profit-floor ladder.

name: addon_cautious
thesis: Test small adds only after proven continuation.

name: addon_score15
thesis: Broaden add-ons but keep confirmation holds.

name: risk_temper_020
thesis: Reduce drawdown and concentration via lower risk.

name: dynamic_risk_mild
thesis: Shift risk toward higher setup score.

name: pb30_relax_orderly
thesis: See whether orderly filter is leaving usable 30m alpha on the table.

name: pb30_value_hits2
thesis: Require stronger value interaction on 30m pullbacks.

name: pb30_ma_fast_slope
thesis: Filter 30m pullbacks by true fast MA slope.

name: pb30_ema20_touch_context
thesis: Qualify 30m pullbacks by EMA20 value touch.

name: pb30_value_touch_market
thesis: Add a 30m EMA20 value-touch entry route.

name: ema20_value_touch_market
thesis: Add a standalone 1h EMA20 value-touch route.

name: ema20_value_touch_limit
thesis: Try passive standalone 1h EMA20 value-touch entries.

name: enable_gld_type_b
thesis: Check if GLD has suppressed shallow pullback alpha.

name: enable_gld_type_b_not_aplus
thesis: Broaden GLD shallow pullbacks without A+ requirement.

name: type_c_aplus_only
thesis: Check if Type-C needs higher regime quality.
